title: Your First Introduction
learningGoal: Write a short, accurate self-introduction in English.
instructions:
英語で簡単な自己紹介を書いてみましょう。以下の3つの情報を必ず入れてください。(Let's write a simple self-introduction in English. Make sure to include the following three pieces of information.)
1. 挨拶 (Greeting)
2. あなたの名前 (Your name)
3. はじめまして (Nice to meet you)
writingPrompt: Write a 3-sentence introduction. Start with a greeting, tell us your name, and finish with a polite closing.
promptGoal: To construct basic introductory sentences in English.

wordBank.transliteration: マイ ネーム イズ
ナイス トゥ ミート ユー

referenceHints: 英語では文の最初は必ず大文字（Capital letter）にします。
文の最後にはピリオド（.）をつけます。
「I（私）」は文のどこにあっても常に大文字です。

modelExampleOutputs.targetText: Hello! My name is Ken. Nice to meet you.
modelExampleOutputs.transliteration: ヘロー！ マイ ネーム イズ ケン。 ナイス トゥ ミート ユー。
modelExampleOutputs.baseTranslation: こんにちは！私の名前はケンです。はじめまして。
modelExampleOutputs.annotation: Perfect capitalization and punctuation. Uses the required phrases clearly.

modelExampleOutputs.targetText: Good morning. I am Yuki. Nice to meet you.
modelExampleOutputs.transliteration: グッド モーニング。 アイ アム ユキ。 ナイス トゥ ミート ユー。
modelExampleOutputs.baseTranslation: おはようございます。私はユキです。はじめまして。
modelExampleOutputs.annotation: Uses 'I am' instead of 'My name is', which is also a perfect way to introduce yourself.

evaluationCriteria.description: Did the student include a greeting, their name, and a closing?
Are sentences capitalized correctly and ended with a period/exclamation mark?
Is 'My name is' or 'I am' used correctly without missing words?

adminCorrectAnswerSet.sampleAnswer: Hello. My name is [Name]. Nice to meet you.
acceptableAlternates: Hi. I am [Name]. Nice to meet you.
adminCorrectAnswerSet.grammarBaseline: Must use 'I am' or 'My name is' correctly. Sentences must be complete.

criteria.name: Task Completion
criteria.description: Included all three parts of the prompt.

feedbackRules.onPass: Great job! This is the perfect way to introduce yourself in English.
feedbackRules.onFail: Please check your capitalization (大文字) and punctuation (ピリオド). Make sure you included a greeting, your name, and 'Nice to meet you'.
feedbackRules.onPartial: Good effort. Make sure every sentence starts with a capital letter.

hintText: Don't forget the period at the end of the sentence!
